news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY, RTYY, MUYY, TMYY, CWY, CRY and 20+ Others
GraniteShares Expands YieldBOOST(TM) Lineup with Launch of CRY and XEY ETFs

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST CRCL ETF (CRY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is actively managed seeking current income and the daily 2x leverage of the price performance of Circle Internet Group, Inc. (CRCL) CRY was launched on Apr 28, 2026 and is issued by GraniteShares.
